story: Inquisitor Kern halts an execution when a stranger delivers an envelope—only a portrait lies inside. The “messenger” shoots both escorts and the accused woman bolts for the trees. The two pistol shots are a signal; kin of the fugitive wait hidden along the forest track where a snare pit and bows have been set for any pursuer. The messenger and Kern duel; the stranger is cut down and dies in the mud. Kern grinds the portrait under his boot, spots a clear line of the woman’s tracks leading into the forest, and moves to finish what he began.
implausible_knowledge: The two pistol shots are a signal; kin of the fugitive wait hidden along the forest track where a snare pit and bows have been set for any pursuer.
question: After seeing the woman’s tracks leading into the forest, what will Kern do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Withdraw to gather soldiers and avoid entering the trapped forest path.
answer_without_knowledge: Follow the tracks into the forest to pursue and kill the fugitive.
